---
title: "005_make_PsRS"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Set up

Load packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)  
library(glmnet)
library(dplyr)
library(pROC)
library(broom)
library(caret)
```

Load data and set lists

```{r}
all_data0 <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Data/all_SDoH_PRS_data.csv")
all_data0$age2 <- all_data0$age^2

domains <- c("individual_poverty", "education",  "fraction_assisted_income", "fraction_high_school_edu", "median_income", "fraction_no_health_insurance", "fraction_poverty", "fraction_vacant_housing",  "deprivation_index")

diseases<-c("Asthma", "Breast_Cancer", "CKD", "CAD", "Prostate_Cancer", "Type_2_Diabetes")

```

## Elastic Net function

```{r}
set.seed(123)
run_elastic_net <- function(diseases, selection_terms, merged_data) {

  ####---------------------------------------------------------------
  #### 1. Containers
  ####---------------------------------------------------------------

  summary_cols <- c(
    "mean_train_score", "sd_train_score",
    "mean_test_score",  "sd_test_score",
    "mean_AUC",         "sd_AUC",
    "n_predictors",     "Predictors"
  )

  model_summary <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(diseases), ncol = length(summary_cols))
  colnames(model_summary) <- summary_cols
  rownames(model_summary) <- diseases
  model_summary <- as.data.frame(model_summary)

  individual_scores <- list()
  weights_list      <- list()

  set.seed(123)

  ####---------------------------------------------------------------
  #### 2. Loop over diseases
  ####---------------------------------------------------------------

  for (disease in diseases) {

    df <- merged_data %>%
      select(epr_number, all_of(disease), all_of(selection_terms)) %>%
      drop_na()

    X <- as.matrix(df %>% select(all_of(selection_terms)))
    y <- as.numeric(df[[disease]])

    penalty_factors <- rep(1, ncol(X))

    ####-----------------------------------------------------------
    #### 3. Cross-validation (performance estimation ONLY)
    ####-----------------------------------------------------------

    n_splits     <- 5
    train_scores <- c()
    test_scores  <- c()
    aucs         <- c()

    for (i in seq_len(n_splits)) {

      idx_train <- createDataPartition(y, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)

      X_train <- X[idx_train, , drop = FALSE]
      X_test  <- X[-idx_train, , drop = FALSE]
      y_train <- y[idx_train]
      y_test  <- y[-idx_train]

      # ---- train-only scaling ----
      scale_min <- apply(X_train, 2, min)
      scale_max <- apply(X_train, 2, max)
      scale_rng <- scale_max - scale_min
      scale_rng[scale_rng == 0] <- 1

      X_train <- sweep(sweep(X_train, 2, scale_min, "-"), 2, scale_rng, "/")
      X_test  <- sweep(sweep(X_test,  2, scale_min, "-"), 2, scale_rng, "/")

      cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
        X_train, y_train,
        alpha = 0.5,
        family = "binomial",
        penalty.factor = penalty_factors
      )

      lambda_best <- cv_fit$lambda.min

      fit <- glmnet(
        X_train, y_train,
        alpha = 0.5,
        lambda = lambda_best,
        family = "binomial",
        penalty.factor = penalty_factors
      )

      # performance
      preds_test <- predict(fit, X_test, type = "link")
      test_scores  <- c(test_scores, cor(preds_test, y_test))
      train_scores <- c(train_scores, cv_fit$cvm[cv_fit$lambda == lambda_best])

      aucs <- c(
        aucs,
        as.numeric(assess.glmnet(cv_fit, newx = X_train, newy = y_train)$auc)
      )
    }

    ####-----------------------------------------------------------
    #### 4. Full-data refit (FINAL MODEL FOR WEIGHTS)
    ####-----------------------------------------------------------

    scale_min_full <- apply(X, 2, min)
    scale_max_full <- apply(X, 2, max)
    scale_rng_full <- scale_max_full - scale_min_full
    scale_rng_full[scale_rng_full == 0] <- 1

    X_scaled <- sweep(sweep(X, 2, scale_min_full, "-"), 2, scale_rng_full, "/")

    cv_full <- cv.glmnet(
      X_scaled, y,
      alpha = 0.5,
      family = "binomial",
      penalty.factor = penalty_factors
    )

    lambda_final <- cv_full$lambda.min

    final_fit <- glmnet(
      X_scaled, y,
      alpha = 0.5,
      lambda = lambda_final,
      family = "binomial",
      penalty.factor = penalty_factors
    )

    coef_final <- as.vector(coef(final_fit))
    names(coef_final) <- rownames(coef(final_fit))

    ####-----------------------------------------------------------
    #### 5. Store weights + scaling metadata
    ####-----------------------------------------------------------

    weights_list[[disease]] <- tibble(
      Disease     = disease,
      Predictor   = names(coef_final),
      weight      = coef_final,
      scale_min   = c(0, scale_min_full),
      scale_max   = c(1, scale_max_full),
      scale_range = c(1, scale_rng_full)
    )

    ####-----------------------------------------------------------
    #### 6. Compute individual PsRS (reference scores)
    ####-----------------------------------------------------------

    Xb <- X_scaled %*% coef_final[-1] + coef_final[1]

    individual_scores[[disease]] <- tibble(
      epr_number = df$epr_number,
      prediction = as.numeric(Xb)
    )

    ####-----------------------------------------------------------
    #### 7. Populate summary table
    ####-----------------------------------------------------------

    nz <- coef_final[-1] != 0

    model_summary[disease, ] <- list(
      mean(train_scores),
      sd(train_scores),
      mean(test_scores),
      sd(test_scores),
      mean(aucs),
      sd(aucs),
      sum(nz),
      paste(names(coef_final[-1])[nz], collapse = ", ")
    )

    message("Completed Elastic Net for: ", disease)
  }
  
  ####---------------------------------------------------------------
  #### 8. Final weights tables
  ####---------------------------------------------------------------

  scales <- bind_rows(weights_list) |> select(-c(weight))
  weights_long <- bind_rows(weights_list)

  weights_wide <- weights_long %>%
    select(Disease, Predictor, weight) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Disease, values_from = weight)

  ####---------------------------------------------------------------
  #### 9. Return
  ####---------------------------------------------------------------

  list(
    model_summary     = model_summary,
    individual_scores = individual_scores,
    scales            = scales,
    weights_wide      = weights_wide
  )
}
```

## **Run ENs**

```{r}
results_all <- run_elastic_net(diseases, domains, all_data0)
selection_terms_no_income<- setdiff(domains, "individual_poverty")      
results_no_income <- run_elastic_net(diseases, selection_terms_no_income, all_data0)

```

## **Save Files**

```{r}
# Reporting
write_excel_csv(results_all[[1]], '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/elastic_net_results.csv')

write_excel_csv(results_no_income[[1]], '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/elastic_net_results_no_income.csv')

# Weights files
write_excel_csv(results_all[[4]], '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_weights_file_PEGS.csv')

write_excel_csv(results_no_income[[4]], '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_weights_file_no_income_PEGS.csv')

#Scaling files
write_excel_csv(results_all[[3]], '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_scaling_file_PEGS.csv')

write_excel_csv(results_no_income[[3]], '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_scaling_file_no_income_PEGS.csv')

```

## **Calculate PsRS**

### Load and prepare data

```{r}
PsRS_scaling_AoU <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Data/PsRS_scaling_file.csv")
PsRS_scaling_no_income_AoU <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Data/PsRS_scaling_file_no_income.csv")
PsRS_weights_AoU <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Data/PsRS_weights_file.csv")
PsRS_weights_no_income_AoU <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Data/PsRS_weights_file_no_income.csv")

PsRS_scaling_PEGS <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_scaling_file_PEGS.csv")
PsRS_scaling_PEGS <- PsRS_scaling_PEGS %>%
  mutate(
    Disease = recode(
      Disease,
      CAD = "CHD",
      Type_2_Diabetes = "t2d",
      Breast_Cancer = "BreastC",
      Prostate_Cancer = "ProstateC"
    ),
    Predictor = recode(
      Predictor,
      individual_poverty = "per_poverty_threshold"
    )
  )
PsRS_scaling_no_income_PEGS <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_scaling_file_no_income_PEGS.csv")
PsRS_scaling_no_income_PEGS <- PsRS_scaling_no_income_PEGS %>%
  mutate(
    Disease = recode(
      Disease,
      CAD = "CHD",
      Type_2_Diabetes = "t2d",
      Breast_Cancer = "BreastC",
      Prostate_Cancer = "ProstateC"))
PsRS_weights_PEGS <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_weights_file_PEGS.csv")
PsRS_weights_PEGS <- PsRS_weights_PEGS |> rename(CHD = CAD,
                               t2d = Type_2_Diabetes,
                               BreastC = Breast_Cancer,
                               ProstateC = Prostate_Cancer) |>
                    mutate(Predictor = recode(Predictor, 
                        individual_poverty = "per_poverty_threshold"))

PsRS_weights_no_income_PEGS <- read.csv("/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/PsRS_weights_file_no_income_PEGS.csv")
PsRS_weights_no_income_PEGS <- PsRS_weights_no_income_PEGS |> 
                              rename(CHD = CAD,
                               t2d = Type_2_Diabetes,
                               BreastC = Breast_Cancer,
                               ProstateC = Prostate_Cancer)

diseases<-c("Asthma", "BreastC", "CKD", "CHD", "ProstateC", "t2d")
domains<-c('per_poverty_threshold', 'education', 
           'fraction_assisted_income', 'fraction_high_school_edu', 'median_income', 
           'fraction_no_health_insurance', 'fraction_poverty', 'fraction_vacant_housing', 'deprivation_index')
domains_no_income <- c('education', 
           'fraction_assisted_income', 'fraction_high_school_edu', 'median_income', 
           'fraction_no_health_insurance', 'fraction_poverty', 'fraction_vacant_housing', 'deprivation_index')

# ------- 0.00 Match column names ------
all_data <- all_data0 |> rename(CHD = CAD,
                               t2d = Type_2_Diabetes,
                               BreastC = Breast_Cancer,
                               ProstateC = Prostate_Cancer,
                               per_poverty_threshold = individual_poverty)
# ---- 0. Add intercept ----
all_data_with_intercept <- all_data %>%
  mutate(`(Intercept)` = 1)

```

### Functions

```{r}
compute_PsRS <- function(domains, PsRS_weights, PsRS_scaling) {
  # ---- 1. Pivot all_data to long for predictors only ----
  long_data <- all_data_with_intercept %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(all_of(domains), `(Intercept)`),
      names_to = "Predictor",
      values_to = "value")

  # ---- 2. Pivot weights to long ----
  weights_long <- PsRS_weights %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(diseases),
      names_to = "Disease",
      values_to = "coef")
  
  # ---- 3. Expand for each disease ----
  # Create all combinations of person_id, Predictor, and disease
  long_data_expanded <- expand_grid(
    epr_number= unique(all_data$epr_number),
    Predictor = unique(long_data$Predictor),
    Disease = diseases
  ) %>%
    left_join(long_data, by = c("epr_number", "Predictor"))
  
  # ---- 4. Join weights and scaling ----
  long_data_scaled <- long_data_expanded %>%
    left_join(weights_long, by = c("Predictor", "Disease")) %>%
    left_join(PsRS_scaling, by = c("Predictor", "Disease")) %>%
    mutate(
      value_scaled = if_else(
        Predictor == "(Intercept)",
       value,
        (value - scale_min) / (scale_max - scale_min)
      ),
      score_part = value_scaled * coef
    )

  # ---- 5. Aggregate to compute PsRS ----
  score_wide <- long_data_scaled %>%
    group_by(epr_number, Disease) %>%
    summarize(score = sum(score_part, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = Disease,
      values_from = score,
      values_fill = 0
    ) %>%
    rename_with(~ paste0(., "_PsRS"), -epr_number)
  
  return(score_wide)
}


plot_PsRS <- function(score_wide) {
  
  # Pivot to long format
  scores_long <- score_wide %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = ends_with("_PsRS"),
      names_to = "disease",
      values_to = "score"
    )

  # Plot facet-wrapped histograms
  plot<-ggplot(scores_long, aes(x = score)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "skyblue", color = "white") +
    facet_wrap(~ disease, scales = "free") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of PsRS",
      x = "Score",
      y = "Count"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
    )
  return(plot)
}

```

#### AoU PsRS

```{r}
results_AoU <- compute_PsRS(domains, PsRS_weights_AoU, PsRS_scaling_AoU)
write_excel_csv(results_AoU, '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/individual_PsRS_AoU.csv')
plot_PsRS(results_AoU)
```

#### AoU no income PsRS

```{r}
results_AoU_no_income <- compute_PsRS(domains_no_income, PsRS_weights_no_income_AoU, PsRS_scaling_no_income_AoU)
write_excel_csv(results_AoU_no_income, '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/individual_PsRS_no_income_AoU.csv')
plot_PsRS(results_AoU_no_income)
```

#### PEGS PsRS

```{r}
results_PEGS <- compute_PsRS(domains, PsRS_weights_PEGS, PsRS_scaling_PEGS)
write_excel_csv(results_PEGS, '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/individual_PsRS_PEGS.csv')
plot_PsRS(results_PEGS)
```

#### PEGS no income PsRS

```{r}
results_PEGS_no_income <- compute_PsRS(domains_no_income, PsRS_weights_no_income_PEGS, PsRS_scaling_no_income_PEGS)
write_excel_csv(results_PEGS_no_income, '/proj/raffieldlab/users/mhysong/PEGS/Results/individual_PsRS_no_income_PEGS.csv')
plot_PsRS(results_PEGS_no_income)
```

## Compare internally and externally trained PsRS

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)

# Find PsRS columns shared by both datasets
psrs_cols <- intersect(
  names(results_PEGS)[str_detect(names(results_PEGS), "_PsRS$")],
  names(results_AoU)[str_detect(names(results_AoU), "_PsRS$")]
)

# Join side-by-side
joined_results <- results_PEGS %>%
  select(epr_number, all_of(psrs_cols)) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_PEGS"), all_of(psrs_cols)) %>%
  inner_join(
    results_AoU %>%
      select(epr_number, all_of(psrs_cols)) %>%
      rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_AoU"), all_of(psrs_cols)),
    by = "epr_number"
  )

# Correlation for each PsRS column
psrs_correlations <- map_dfr(psrs_cols, function(col) {
  tibble(
    PsRS = col,
    correlation = cor(
      joined_results[[paste0(col, "_PEGS")]],
      joined_results[[paste0(col, "_AoU")]],
      use = "complete.obs",
      method = "pearson"
    ),
    n_complete = sum(complete.cases(
      joined_results[[paste0(col, "_PEGS")]],
      joined_results[[paste0(col, "_AoU")]]
    ))
  )
})

psrs_correlations
```
